goal: Helm — installable PWA coaching companion that teaches a fintech-bound product designer to lead with consumer-facing frontier-model AI; BYO Claude API key; fully owned by operator; deployed to GitHub Pages + AWS commercial.
rationale: Greenfield build with caller-specified curriculum scope (11 named topics) and named end-user. Phases 1-2 (lit-review, research-prompt), 7 (partition-extractor) and 8 (capability-tree) exist to discover requirements in a novel domain. Here the domain is well-bounded consumer AI product education; running discovery phases would inflate ceremony without changing the requirement set. Per skill-chain rule: a phase may be skipped only if its output is unnecessary for the goal. We record the skip and the rationale; we do not silently elide.

drive_plan.reason: no Omega-space to infer; scope is pre-specified
11 capabilities are the 11 curriculum modules; tree is flat

destructive_action_gate.covering_token: user-issued: 'aws commercial go go go' + 'apply to my personal github'
scope: deploy static assets to GitHub Pages
deploy static assets to AWS commercial account 327416545926 via S3 + (optional) CloudFront
destructive_action_gate.blast_radius: self-owned personal infra; no shared production system touched
